summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. New Resend-backed inquiry flow (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/inquiries) and admin Inquiries tab fully verified. Backend: 17/17 new pytest tests passed including live Resend email_sent=true. Frontend: Inquire modal opens from Products page with prefilled message, HTML5 validation blocks empty/invalid fields, valid submit shows success view with first name + email echo, WhatsApp+Email fallback links present, Continue browsing closes. Admin > Inquiries tab shows N-new pill, status chips, full card content, toggle status (new<->handled) and Delete both work and refresh the list. Previous endpoints (auth/blogs/products) regression-tested OK.

issues: Several product images render broken (alt text shown): 'Potted English Lavender', 'Rosemary for Memory', 'Sleep Well Roll-On'. Their Unsplash URLs (e.g. photo-1595351479937-7aa5cc64f1cb, photo-1550411294-098063f05f99, photo-1608571423902-eed4a5ad8108) likely 404 or are blocked. Replace with valid Unsplash IDs or alternative imagery.

action_items: Replace broken product image URLs for Potted English Lavender, Rosemary for Memory, Sleep Well Roll-On (cosmetic). All other features pass.
critical_code_review_comments: send_inquiry_email correctly uses asyncio.to_thread to avoid blocking the event loop on resend.Emails.send (sync SDK).
Inquiry is persisted regardless of email outcome — exception handling around Resend is correct (try/except, returns False, request still succeeds).
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded ({_id:0} projection + doc.pop('_id', None) on insert).
No auth on POST /api/inquiries (public form) — correct for the use case but recommend rate-limit / captcha to prevent spam-flooding kartk.vani@gmail.com via Resend.
PATCH /api/inquiries/{id} uses query-param `status` instead of JSON body — works but unconventional. Consider a Pydantic body model for consistency.
Pydantic EmailStr handles invalid email validation cleanly (422). Field length constraints (name 2-120, message 5-2000) enforced.
InquireModal: useEffect dependency intentionally excludes `product?.id` warning via eslint-disable — OK.
AdminDashboard.jsx is ~370 lines — getting close to 700 line cap; if a 'Products' admin tab is added later, consider splitting Inquiries panel into its own component.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test inquiries during testing; both cleaned up after run. DB state restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inquiry suite at /app/backend/tests/test_inquiries.py covers: create (success+email_sent=true, invalid email 422, short message 422, short name 422), list (401 without auth, 200 admin sorted desc), patch (handled, invalid 400, unknown 404, 401), delete (401, 200, 404 on second). Resend live key in /app/backend/.env — destination kartk.vani@gmail.com is the verified account owner so onboarding@resend.dev sender works. Frontend uses InquireModal with prefilled message including product.name. Admin tab toggle uses query-param ?status=. Note: previous iteration_1 minor issues (logout->/, mobile menu z-index, /api/ root ordering) appear FIXED in this iteration per main agent's note — not retested individually but auth/blogs/products regression tests all pass.
